A nifty little clipboard manager for Chrome

𝐅𝐞𝐚𝐭𝐮𝐫𝐞𝐬:
✓ Copy items to Nifty unlimited times.

✓ Paste items from Nifty as many times as you need to.

✓ Delete a single item or delete all items at once.

✓ Nifty is automatically saved across browser sessions.

𝐇𝐨𝐰 𝐭𝐨 𝐔𝐬𝐞 𝐍𝐢𝐟𝐭𝐲:
𝟏.) After installing Nifty, pin it to your browser.

𝟐.) Grant Nifty permission to access your clipboard.

𝐇𝐨𝐰 𝐭𝐨 𝐂𝐨𝐩𝐲 𝐚𝐧 𝐢𝐭𝐞𝐦 𝐭𝐨 𝐍𝐢𝐟𝐭𝐲:
Highlight text & press CMD+C or Control+C.

𝐇𝐨𝐰 𝐭𝐨 𝐏𝐚𝐬𝐭𝐞 𝐚𝐧 𝐢𝐭𝐞𝐦 𝐟𝐫𝐨𝐦 𝐍𝐢𝐟𝐭𝐲:
Click on the item or press the ‘paste’ button to the right of the item.

𝐇𝐨𝐰 𝐭𝐨 𝐃𝐞𝐥𝐞𝐭𝐞 𝐚𝐧 𝐈𝐭𝐞𝐦 𝐨𝐧 𝐍𝐢𝐟𝐭𝐲:
Click on the ‘delete’ button to the right of the item.

𝐇𝐨𝐰 𝐭𝐨 𝐃𝐞𝐥𝐞𝐭𝐞 𝐀𝐥𝐥 𝐈𝐭𝐞𝐦𝐬 𝐨𝐧 𝐍𝐢𝐟𝐭𝐲:
Click on the ‘delete all items’ button at the bottom right of Nifty.

𝐈𝐟 𝐘𝐨𝐮 𝐄𝐧𝐜𝐨𝐮𝐧𝐭𝐞𝐫 𝐚𝐧 𝐈𝐬𝐬𝐮𝐞:
✓ Visit chrome://extensions. Click the refresh button on the Nifty extension card.
✓ If the issue persists, email the developer or submit a bug report.

𝐒𝐮𝐩𝐩𝐨𝐫𝐭 𝐖𝐞𝐛𝐬𝐢𝐭𝐞: https://AbdullahHamid.ca

𝐑𝐞𝐭𝐮𝐫𝐧𝐢𝐧𝐠 𝐮𝐬𝐞𝐫? 𝐑𝐞𝐚𝐝 𝐭𝐡𝐞 𝐂𝐡𝐚𝐧𝐠𝐞 𝐋𝐨𝐠:
https://abdullahhamid.ca/update-nifty

Debug OIDC/OAuth2 auth flows — works standalone or with the Ping SDK

A devtool to help debug OIDC auth flows. Compatible with Ping Identity Davinci and Ping Identity AM with helper npm packages.

Support for standard OIDC flows as well.
Vim motions for every text input in the browser

Vim keybindings for every text input, textarea, and contenteditable element in the browser.

If you use Vim, you know the pain of editing text in browser inputs - reaching for the mouse, memorizing OS shortcuts, losing your flow. Input Vim adds a lightweight Vim layer on top of any text field so you can stay on the home row.

FEATURES

-- Four modes - Normal, Insert, Visual, and Visual Line
-- Full motion system - word (w/b/e/W/B/E), line (0/^/$), find/till (f/F/t/T), search (/term, *, n/N), document (gg/G, Ctrl+D/U)
-- Operators - delete (d), change (c), yank (y) - composable with any motion or text object
-- Text objects - iw, aw, i(, a{, i", a', i[, a< and more
-- Count prefixes - 3w, 5j, 2dd - repeat any motion or command
-- Undo/Redo - per-element undo stack independent of the browser
-- Visual overlay - mode badge, block cursor, and pending command display
-- System clipboard sync - optional yank/paste with OS clipboard
-- Configurable - start mode, bracket matching, tab size, yank highlight, scroll jump size, always-centered mode, and site exclusions

WORKS WITH

-- <input> fields (text, search, url, tel, email, password)
-- <textarea> elements with multiline support
-- contenteditable elements (GitHub, Notion, rich text editors)

SETTINGS

Click the extension icon to configure: toggle on/off, start mode, bracket auto-close, tab width, clipboard sync, yank highlight, Ctrl+D/U jump size, always-centered mode, and per-site exclusion patterns.

Settings sync across Chrome devices.
Extracts the first URL from clipboard content and copies it to the clipboard.

Have you ever copied an image from a Google Doc only to find that pasting it elsewhere doesn't work as expected? The image URL is actually stored in your clipboard, but not in a way that's immediately usable. This extension solves that problem by extracting the image URL from your clipboard and copying it back in a format you can use.

- Extracts the image URL from your clipboard when you copy an image from Google Docs.
- Automatically copies the extracted URL back to your clipboard.
- Ensures that pasting the URL results in the full-size image being accessible.
Speed read at 300-1000 words per minute using the RSVP (Rapid Serial Visual Presentation) technique. Perfect any long form content.

What is RSVP?
RSVP (Rapid Serial Visual Presentation) is a reading method where words appear one at a time in the same place on the screen. Your eyes stop moving across lines, reducing wasted motion and increasing focus. This allows significantly faster reading with less fatigue.

Read For Speed turns any webpage into an RSVP reader.

Core Features
	•	1–3 Word Chunks – choose single-word precision or multi-word flow
	•	Right-click on selected text to open from any webpage
	•	Adjustable Speed – fine control over words per minute
	•	Skip Ahead / Back – jump by sentence or paragraph
	•	Pause & Resume – instant control without losing position
	•	Session Statistics – track time, words read, and average speed
	•	Clean Extraction – reads article content without ads or clutter
	•	Works on Any Page – blogs, news, documentation, long posts
	•	Offline Friendly – reading mode works after page load
	•	Open from floating button, context menu, or extension toolbar
	•	Light and Dark mode support


Who This Is For
	•	Students reading dense material
	•	Developers reading docs and articles
	•	Professionals processing long reports
	•	Anyone who wants to finish online reading in less time

How It Works
	1.	Open any webpage
	2.	Click the extension, or select text and choose from right-click menu.
	3.	Press play
	4.	Control speed and chunk size while reading

No accounts. No tracking. All stats stored locally.
Isme: Ethereum, BSC and BTC Wallet

Another me,
Multi-chain wallet in your browser.

Isme is an extension that provides easy access to the web3 world on the Bitcoin and Ethereum ecosystems directly in the browser. A non-custodial wallet that doesn't track any data and gives you full control over your assets!

Your cryptocurrencies should be anywhere, so we built a wallet that is powerful, easy to use, and multi-chain future-proof.

With Isme, users have full control over their digital assets and digital identities.
Enables various additional features on Mojang's bug tracker Mojira for helpers, moderators, and other Mojira power users.

This is a browser extension enabling various additional features on Mojang's bug tracker Mojira (https://bugs.mojang.com/) for helpers, moderators, and other Mojira power users.

Please note that the helper messages included in this extension may only be used by Mojira helpers, moderators, and Mojang staff.

For more information, check out the GitHub page at https://github.com/mojira/mojira-plus
Convert pasted Excel tables into Backlog table notation.

This extension converts Excel tables into Backlog table notation the moment you paste them into editable fields on web pages.

Key features
- Automatically converts copied Excel tables into Backlog table notation
- Standard paste treats the first row as a header row
- Pasting while holding Shift treats the first column as header cells
- Converts text color and background color into Backlog's &color(...) syntax
- Converts line breaks inside cells into &br;
- Attempts to restore Excel color information even when using plain-text paste such as Ctrl+Shift+V
- Converts URL hyperlinks into Backlog link notation (ver.1.0.2)

This extension processes only the content required for the paste action locally in the browser. It does not send data to external servers and does not require account integration.

Convert Bijoy/ANSI encoded Bengali text to Unicode. Select text and right-click to convert, or use the popup.

Professional Bijoy/ANSI to Unicode Bengali text converter. Seamless Google Docs support and instant clipboard auto-conversion.

Detailed Description
Bijoy to Unicode Converter is the ultimate tool for anyone working with Bengali text in professional or academic environments. It allows you to instantly convert legacy Bijoy/ANSI (SutonnyMJ) encoded text into modern, web-friendly Unicode.

Key Features:

Automatic Conversion: Switch on "Auto-Convert" in the popup, and any Bijoy text you copy (Ctrl+C) will be instantly converted to Unicode in your clipboard.
Google Docs Support: Works flawlessly inside Google Docs and other online editors.
Smart Detection: Advanced logic identifies Bijoy markers and prevents mangling of standard English text.
Context Menu: Highlight any text on a webpage, right-click, and select "Convert to Unicode" to see the result instantly.
Performance Focused: Built using a lightweight, local engine that processes thousands of characters in milliseconds with 100% privacy.
Extensive Glyph Support: Handles complex Juktakkhor and special characters found in older MS Word files.
Perfect for journalists, students, and office workers who need to bridge the gap between legacy documents and modern web platforms.

Image Float Board — Your Floating Reference Tool for the Web

Elevate your workflow with Image Float Board, the lightweight browser extension designed for professionals who need constant visual references without switching tabs. Whether you are a UI designer matching pixels, a developer referencing mockups, or a student taking notes from diagrams, Image Float Board keeps your inspiration right where you need it.

🚀 Key Features:

Multi-Image Support: Paste or upload as many images as you need. Each image acts as an independent floating board.

Seamless Import: Instantly add images from your clipboard (Ctrl+V) or upload local files with a single click.

Smart Interaction: Smoothly drag images to any position and use your mouse wheel to scale them up or down instantly.

Dynamic Layering: Click any image to bring it to the front. Manage your workspace effortlessly.

Zero Distraction: A clean, minimalist UI. Hover over an image to reveal the "Close" button—out of sight when you don't need it.

🛠 How to Use:

Open the extension popup.

Click "Upload" or "Paste from Clipboard".

Drag the image to position it.

Scroll to resize.

Close individual images by hovering and clicking the "×" icon.

🎯 Use Cases:

UI/UX Designers: Overlay design mockups on live sites for pixel-perfect comparisons.

Artists & Illustrators: Keep anatomy or color references visible while browsing.

Students: Pin charts, formulas, or diagrams while completing online assignments.

Developers: Reference UI specs or flowcharts while coding in the browser.

🔒 Privacy First: Image Float Board respects your privacy. All image processing happens locally on your machine. We do not collect, store, or transmit any of your data or images.
Copy, and open multiple links across active tabs with ease.

Tab Bucket is a Chrome extension that lets you easily collect and share multiple URLs at once. Select links from open tabs, generate a single shareable link, and copy it with one click. Recipients can paste the shared link into the extension, click "Detect and Open," and instantly open all the tabs. Simplify link sharing and streamline your browsing experience!
Takes .png files copied using the Snipping Tool or from your file explorer and let's you paste them into any "Choose File" button…

Takes .png files copied using the Snipping Tool or from your file explorer and let's you paste them into any "Choose File" button you see on the web. Simply right click on the "Choose File" button and select "Paste to Choose File"
Static analysis and security check for n8n workflows.

FlowLint for n8n - audit workflows right in your browser. The extension auto-detects n8n JSON from your clipboard, runs static checks (retry/backoff, error handling, dead ends, idempotence, secrets), and shows clear findings with suggested fixes. Zero setup, no data sent outside the browser, perfect for quick workflow reviews.
A quick note-taking extension for your side panel.

🗒️ Digital Napkin Side Panel - Your Personal Sticky Note Board
Turn your browser's side panel into a powerful, visual note-taking workspace. Digital Napkin lets you capture ideas, organize thoughts, and keep important information at your fingertips while browsing.
✨ KEY FEATURES:

📌 Pin Important Notes
Keep your most critical notes at the top where they belong. Never lose track of important information again.

🎨 Colorful Organization
Cycle through 10 beautiful pastel colors to categorize and visually organize your notes. Make your workspace as vibrant as your ideas.

🔄 Drag & Drop Reordering
Reorganize your notes effortlessly with intuitive drag and drop. Your perfect layout is just a drag away.

🖼️ Image Support
Paste images directly into your notes! Screenshots, diagrams, or photos - they all work seamlessly.

📋 Smart Clipboard Tools & Auto-Save 
Optional "Auto-Save Copied Text" automatically turns anything you copy on the web into a note in the background! (Can be toggled off in settings). 
- One-click paste from clipboard. 
- Copy your notes as plain text or rich HTML.
- Perfect for seamlessly saving content and deep research from web pages.

🔍 Instant Search
Quickly find any note with real-time search that filters through both titles and content.

🌙 Dark Mode
Easy on your eyes with a beautiful dark theme. Toggle between light and dark modes to match your preference.

💾 Import & Export
• Export individual notes or all notes as XML
• Download notes as text files
• Import previously exported notes
• Never lose your data when switching devices

🔄 Real-Time Sync
Notes sync instantly between your side panel and full-page view. Open notes in a new tab for expanded editing.

📏 Character Counter
Track the length of each note with an automatic character counter displayed in the footer.

⏰ Timestamp Tracking
Every note shows when it was last modified, so you always know which notes are most recent.

🗂️ Custom Note Grouping & Filtering
Go beyond colors! Create your own custom groups (like "Work", "Ideas", "To-Do") to categorize your notes. Use the new smart filter dropdown at the top to instantly display only the notes in a specific group. Each custom group even gets an elegant auto-assigned pastel color!

⚙️ Powerful Settings Menu
We've added a dedicated settings hub. Fully customize your experience by choosing your preferred Font Size (Small, Normal, Large) and selecting how your notes are ordered by default (Newest First or Oldest First).

PERFECT FOR:
• Quick research notes while browsing
• Keeping track of tasks and reminders
• Saving snippets of text from websites
• Drafting ideas and brainstorming
• Collecting reference information
• Meeting notes and action items

🖥️ Clean, Responsive Hover UI
Your workspace has never looked cleaner. Note action buttons (like delete, copy, pin) are now hidden by default to remove clutter - they only elegantly appear when you hover your mouse over a note. Plus, the grid intelligently adapts, showing a single focused column in the side panel, and expanding instantly to fill your screen when opened in a full page!


Your notes are stored locally in your browser using Chrome's storage API, ensuring privacy and instant access. No account required, no cloud sync to worry about - your thoughts stay on your device.
Start jotting down your brilliant ideas today! 💡
Simplifies scrolling, copy, paste, clearing fields, resizing images, and dropdown selection into quick one-action mouse operations.

Handy Mouse Pack turns everyday actions like copying, pasting, clearing fields, dropdown selection, scrolling, and resizing images into quick, one-action mouse operations.

# Features and How to Use

- **Copy Selected Text**: Just drag to select text, and it will automatically be copied to the clipboard.
- **Paste from Clipboard (Text Areas & Text Boxes)**: Click the middle mouse button (mouse wheel click) on a text area or text box to instantly paste the clipboard contents.
- **Clear Text Boxes**: Scroll the mouse wheel while hovering over a text box to quickly clear its contents and prepare for new input.
- **Change Dropdown Selections**: Scroll the mouse wheel while hovering over a dropdown menu to easily change the selected option.
- **Scroll Page with Middle Button Drag**: Hold the middle mouse button and drag to scroll the page proportionally to the mouse movement.
- **Resize Images with Right Button Drag**: Right-click and drag on an image to resize it. Dragging right or down enlarges the image, while dragging left or up shrinks it. To reset the image to its original size, simply right-click on it.

# Source code
https://github.com/ronekko/handy_mouse_pack

Canned replies, canned responses, canned messages for any website
Canned replies, preset posts, comments: Create and use saved replies, canned responses in any website, social network

In today’s fast-paced digital world, time is a precious commodity. Whether you're a customer service representative, a social media manager, or a business owner, managing online interactions efficiently is crucial. Enter the world of canned replies—prewritten responses you can quickly use across various websites and social networks. This Chrome extension is designed to help you save time, streamline communication, and maintain consistency in your online messaging.

What Are Canned Replies?

Canned replies, also known as canned responses or saved replies, are pre-composed messages that can be reused across different platforms. These responses can be tailored to fit specific scenarios, such as responding to frequently asked questions, acknowledging customer feedback, or providing information about your products or services. With canned replies, you can ensure that your communication remains consistent, professional, and efficient, no matter how many inquiries you receive.

Why Use Canned Replies?

Save Time: Instead of typing the same response repeatedly, canned replies allow you to insert pre-written messages with just a few clicks. This can be particularly beneficial for busy professionals who handle multiple inquiries daily.

Consistency in Communication: By using standardized responses, you ensure that your message remains consistent across different platforms. This is especially important for businesses that want to maintain a uniform brand voice.

Reduce Errors: Typing the same message over and over increases the likelihood of making mistakes. With canned replies, you can reduce errors and ensure that your responses are clear and accurate.

Increase Productivity: Canned replies free up your time, allowing you to focus on more critical tasks, such as developing new strategies, engaging with customers on a deeper level, or creating content.

How to Use Canned Replies on Any Website

Installing a Chrome extension for canned replies is simple and can be done in just a few steps:

Download the Extension: Search for a canned replies or saved responses extension in the Chrome Web Store and add it to your browser.

Create Your Replies: Once installed, you can start creating your canned replies. Most extensions will allow you to categorize and organize your messages for easy access.

Use Your Replies: Whenever you encounter a scenario that requires a pre-written response, simply select the appropriate canned reply from the extension’s menu. It will automatically insert the text into the reply box, saving you time and effort.

Customize as Needed: While canned replies are a great time-saver, they are also customizable. You can quickly modify the text to fit the specific context of your conversation.

Real-World Applications

Canned replies are incredibly versatile and can be used across various industries and platforms:

Customer Support: Respond to common queries or troubleshoot issues quickly.
Social Media Management: Engage with your audience more efficiently by responding to comments and messages with prewritten responses.
E-commerce: Provide consistent information about shipping, returns, and product details.
Freelancers: Save time on project proposals, client communications, and more.
Call to Action

If you haven’t already, it’s time to start using canned replies to enhance your online communication. By integrating a canned replies extension into your workflow, you can save time, maintain consistency, and reduce errors in your messaging. This simple yet powerful tool can transform how you interact online, allowing you to focus on what truly matters—growing your business and connecting with your audience.

Don’t let repetitive tasks slow you down. Download a canned replies extension today and see the difference it can make in your productivity and efficiency. Whether you’re managing a busy inbox, handling customer inquiries, or engaging on social media, canned replies are the key to streamlined and effective communication.
